summary: Completed comprehensive Phase B testing: Admin Panel overhaul with multi-user RBAC (5 roles), complete PDF Document Management System with Emergent Object Storage, API Integrations management, System Settings, and access control. Backend: 100% pass (35/35 tests). Frontend: Admin panel fully functional with all 9 tabs accessible to super_admin, engineer correctly redirected from /admin. Minor bug fixed in Documents.js (null url handling).

ui_bugs.issue: Admin Panel link not visible in sidebar - users must navigate directly to /admin URL

fixed_bugs.issue: fileUrl function threw error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading url)' for documents without url
fixed_bugs.fix: Added fallback to return '#' when d.url is null/undefined

passed_tests: Backend: Create user with all 5 roles available
Backend: Self-modification prevention (cannot change own role/status)
Backend: List all 5 roles (super_admin, admin, engineer, procurement, viewer)
Backend: Upload PDF document (Emergent Object Storage)
Backend: Replace document (version control - v1 to v2)
Backend: List API integrations (exa, tavily, firecrawl, emergent_llm)
Backend: Access control - engineer cannot access /admin/users (403)
Backend: Access control - engineer cannot access /admin/brands (403)
Backend: Regression - Documents endpoint works for all users
Backend: Regression - Dashboard summary includes exa_search in api_status
Frontend: Super admin can access /admin via direct navigation
Frontend: All 9 tabs visible for super_admin (Users, Roles, Brands, Categories, Products, Documents, Search Logs, AI Logs, API Integrations, System Settings)
Frontend: Users tab displays user table with 2 users
Frontend: Roles tab displays 5 role cards
Frontend: Documents tab displays 19 documents with Upload PDF, Bulk Upload buttons
Frontend: Documents tab shows version badges (v1) and source badges (Upload/Auto)
Frontend: API Integrations tab displays 4 integration cards with Test Connection buttons
Frontend: System Settings tab displays LLM provider select and model input
Frontend: Access control - engineer redirected from /admin to /dashboard
Frontend: Regression - Dashboard loads for engineer with API status widget (Exa, Tavily, Firecrawl, AI Analysis)
action_item_for_main_agent: MINOR UI IMPROVEMENT: Add Admin Panel link to sidebar navigation for super_admin/admin roles (currently accessible only via direct /admin URL). All core Phase B features are fully functional.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor sidebar navigation issue, all features functional)
